title: Carlos still awaits. ~
message: There was a man called Carlos, A Spain scientist who is exploring the laws of physics. One day at his house in 265 Hayden ln north Carolina, He found an old smelling notepad in the basement. It looked like some math questions were inside of it, A kid screaming "2=l sybolic stuf x.2=l". The more he looked, the more clear it came: the laws of physics were held by the army of nations to come. Carlos drove for 5 hours. The army refused to answer. He drove back one day (traffic). Then his house was destroyed by a nuclear facility trying to take that area. It smelled more like hotdogs than smoke. He grabbed his defyn 2x000 ring that turns anyone into a honest 10 years old. He uses it against the force of the facility. The facility attacks Carlos. All the workers were confused even Carlos. Then the answer was hidden inside of the earth. Carlos spanked himself 50 times, then grabbed a chainsaw. Fast and uncontrollable. He made it to the center of the earth to see a big red giant ball Rickr-~
